query: SELECT id, title, startTime, CONVERT_TZ(startTime, '+00:00', '+09:00') as jst_time FROM schedules;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute SELECT id, title, startTime, CONVERT_TZ(startTime, '+00:00', '+09:00') as jst_time FROM schedules;
